title: rodrigoa hortensis
intro: Rodigoa hortensis, also known as Rodrigoa, is a plant species in the family Rutaceae, native to tropical Asia. Rodrigoa hortensis has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which can be attributed to the presence of essential oils and flavonoids. The health benefits of Rodrigoa hortensis include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems, making it a valuable herb in traditional medicine. Rodrigoa hortensis is often prepared as a tea or infusion, and its essential oil is used in aromatherapy and skincare applications.
